inkwash.name: Ink Wash (Sumi-e)
inkwash.suffix: This is an artistic ink wash style painting, sumi-e aesthetic, delicate brushstrokes, subtle ink gradients, soft layered washes, refined composition, high detail, intricate textures, expressive composition. No text, no watermark, no logos, no blur, no anatomical errors, no extra limbs

ukiyoe.name: Ukiyo-e (Japanese Woodblock)
ukiyoe.suffix: Ukiyo-e style, Japanese woodblock print aesthetic, flat bold outlines, traditional Edo-period color palette, woodblock carving texture, stylized natural forms, decorative patterned fabrics, flowing linear detail, Japanese woodcut print, Hiroshige and Hokusai influenced, hand-printed feel. No text, no watermark, no logos, no blur, no anatomical errors, no extra limbs
